name: eryx

metadata.name: Eryx
metadata.summary: A decently fast simple dynamically typed programming language similar to javascript/python.

documentation:
# Eryx
 A decently fast simple dynamically typed programming language similar to javascript/python.

modules.name: eryx.frontend.ast
documentation: Abstract syntax tree (AST) for the frontend.

classes.name: eryx.frontend.ast.Statement
documentation: Base class for all statements in the AST.

functions.name: eryx.playground.playground.ansi_to_html
documentation: Format ANSI color codes to HTML.

functions.name: eryx.playground.playground.get_unique_uuid
documentation: Get a unique UUID that does not exist in dictionary.

classes.name: eryx.playground.playground.TokenList
documentation: List of tokens to use with the pretty printer.

modules.name: eryx.frontend.syntax_highlighter
documentation: Module for lexer based syntax highlighting code.

functions.name: eryx.frontend.lexer.is_skipable
documentation: Check if a character is a skipable character.

functions.name: eryx.frontend.lexer.position_to_line_column
documentation: Convert a position to a line and column number.

functions.name: eryx.frontend.lexer.get_line_string
documentation: Get the line string from the source code.

classes.name: eryx.frontend.lexer.TokenType
documentation: All token types in the language.

modules.name: eryx.runtime.values
documentation: Values and their types in the runtime environment.

classes.name: eryx.runtime.values.RuntimeValue
documentation: Base class for all runtime values.

modules.name: eryx.__main__
documentation: Eryx entry point and Command Line Interface (CLI) module.

modules.name: eryx.frontend.parser
documentation: Parser module for the frontend of the compiler.

methods.name: eryx.frontend.parser.Parser.not_eof
documentation: Check if the parser has not reached the end of the token stream.

methods.name: eryx.frontend.parser.Parser.next
documentation: Get the current token and skip to next one (also called eat).

methods.name: eryx.frontend.parser.Parser.assert_next
documentation: Assert that the next token is of a certain type and return it.

methods.name: eryx.frontend.parser.Parser.produce_ast
documentation: Produce an abstract syntax tree (AST) from source code.

modules.name: eryx.runtime.repl
documentation: Main entry point for the REPL.

modules.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print
documentation: Module to pretty print a class instance for debugging. (the code is actual garbage but it works)

functions.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print.isclass
documentation: Check if a variable is a class.

functions.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print.isenum
documentation: Check if a variable is an enum.

functions.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print.isfunction
documentation: Check if a variable is a function.

functions.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print.get_color
documentation: Helper function to get the color of a value type.

functions.name: eryx.utils.pretty_print.handle_array
documentation: Helper function to handle lists, tuples and sets.

functions.name: eryx.runtime.interpreter.eval_numeric_binary_expression
documentation: Evaluate a binary expression with two parsed numeric operands (always numbers).

modules.name: eryx.runtime.environment
documentation: Environment class for storing variables (also called scope).

functions.name: eryx.runtime.environment.get_value
documentation: Get the value of a RuntimeValue.

methods.name: eryx.runtime.environment.Environment.declare_variable
documentation: Declare a variable in the current scope.

methods.name: eryx.runtime.environment.Environment.assign_variable
documentation: Assign a value to a variable in the current scope.

methods.name: eryx.runtime.environment.Environment.lookup_variable
documentation: Lookup a variable in the current scope.

methods.name: eryx.runtime.environment.Environment.resolve
documentation: Resolve a variable name to an environment.
